sources.evidence: Official Blackburn Bowls Club home page identifies the club at 65 Pakenham Street, Blackburn, its 1927 formation, greens, pennant sides, membership and public bowls.
Official club calendar page carrying the Blackburn Bowls Club identity, address and club contact details.
Official Blackburn Bowls Club news category containing current club announcements and office-bearer updates.
Official club events page describes year-round bowls, social events and Blackburn's Saturday and Midweek Pennant participation.
Official new bowlers page documents coaching, practice access and current membership categories for Blackburn Bowls Club.
Official club page describes Blackburn's Wednesday Night Owls and Friday Barefoot Bowls public sessions.
Official pennant page links Blackburn's Saturday, Midweek and Night Pennant information and identifies its competition sides.
Official facilities page provides Blackburn Bowls Club function, hall, bowls, kitchen and bar hire information.
Official history page documents the club's 1926 organising meeting, 1927 formation and move from South Parade to Pakenham Street.
Official contact page supplies Blackburn Bowls Club's location and enquiry details.
